prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `3979b1a8`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `3979b1a8` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3979b1a8/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3979b1a8/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3979b1a8/generator.py#L35). The rule is: take the corner color, center-plus color, and background color from the input; copy the input to the upper-left; extend a 3-color cycle across the top-right and bottom-left; fill the bottom-right by using the row/column cycle with the main diagonal advanced by one step. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

The generator stays in-family by preserving the exact latent motif from the official task: four colored corners, a centered 3x3 plus, and no extra noise. To reach 1000 unique examples it varies only the odd square size and the ordered 3-color assignment, then constructs the output directly from that latent structure in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3979b1a8/generator.py#L15).

Validation passed:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 3979b1a8`
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 3979b1a8 --n-examples 1000`
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 3979b1a8`

Artifacts are present at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3979b1a8/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3979b1a8/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3979b1a8/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3979b1a8/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3979b1a8/previews/preview_03.png).
